title: Marigold Extra Tough Outdoor Gloves - Single Pair (Medium), Black
features: Marigold Extra Tough Outdoor Gloves feature a heavy duty coating to protect against the most common weed killers, pesticides and fertilisers
Double layered latex giving extra protection for heavy duty tasks around the home and garden
Cotton lining helps to keep hands dry and comfortable with roll-top cuffs to help them stay up and prevent water running up arm
Excellent strong pattern for a good grip even in wet conditions
Conformity with the provisions of Regulation (EU) 2016/425
description: Product Description Marigold Extra Tough Outdoor Gloves with improved durability for long lifetime. Heavy duty natural rubber latex coating protects against the most common weed killers, pesticides and fertilisers. Cotton lining to keep hands dry and comfortable. Rolled cuffs for easier donning and prevention of liquid rolling back. Feature a strong pattern on the fingers for excellent grip. Manufacturer Contact Information FHP LP, OL16 2AX, UK.
